getCourses() - Static method in class core.DataStorage
Returns all courses.
getInstance() - Static method in class core.DataStorage
Returns singleton instance of DataStorage.
getNews() - Static method in class core.DataStorage
Returns sorted news list.
getOrganizations() - Static method in class core.DataStorage
Returns all organizations.
getRequests() - Static method in class core.DataStorage
Returns all requests.
getResearchers() - Static method in class core.DataStorage
Returns all researchers.
getTopCitedResearcher() - Static method in class core.DataStorage
Finds researcher with the highest total number of citations.
getTopCitedResearcherByYear(int) - Static method in class core.DataStorage
Finds top cited researcher for a specific year.
getUsers() - Static method in class core.DataStorage
Returns all users.
